results.finalAnswer:
ENTRYPOINT: mcp/stdio/server.js
SUBSYSTEM: mcp/stdio/ingest - owns graph ingest, extraction, resolver, and sweep/indexing work
SUBSYSTEM: mcp/stdio/freshness - orchestrates when the graph is rebuilt or refreshed via `ensureFresh`
SUBSYSTEM: mcp/stdio/query/verbs - exposes the MCP query verb layer over the indexed graph

ENTRYPOINT: mcp/stdio/server.js
SUBSYSTEM: mcp/stdio/query/verbs - exposes the MCP query surface; it is the main user-facing verb layer
SUBSYSTEM: mcp/stdio/ingest - builds the graph from repo code via extraction, resolution, and sweep stages
SUBSYSTEM: mcp/stdio/freshness - keeps the graph current by orchestrating freshness checks and rebuilds

ENTRYPOINT: mcp/stdio/server.js
SUBSYSTEM: mcp/stdio/query/verbs - user-facing MCP query verb handlers
SUBSYSTEM: mcp/stdio/ingest - graph indexing, sweep, resolver, and extraction pipeline
SUBSYSTEM: mcp/stdio/freshness - freshness orchestration that ensures graph data is up to date
